Festival & Large Events

Portable archery fun that sets up anywhere — perfect for festivals, fairs, and community events

Looking for a crowd-pleasing activity for your festival, fair, or large community event? Sherwood Adventure brings archery tag entertainment directly to your venue anywhere in the Phoenix Metro and Southwest Valley area. Our HoverBall setup is specifically designed for high-traffic event environments — compact, safe, and engaging for all ages.

We are a fully mobile operation. We bring everything — equipment, setup, staffing, and teardown. You focus on running your event while we run the archery games.

HoverBall — Built for Festivals

Our inflatable archery target activity uses lightweight 8 lb recurve bows and foam-tipped arrows — safe, pain-free, and appropriate for ages 7 and up, including young children with adult supervision. Participants take aim at floating ball targets for a fun, low-pressure archery experience that draws a crowd and keeps guests coming back.

  • Sets up in just 20 × 15 feet of space with a 9-foot ceiling minimum
  • Works indoors or outdoors
  • Multiple game formats for variety throughout the day
  • No archery experience required — our staff teaches everyone
  • Suitable for ages 7 and up
  • High throughput — great for rotating groups of festival attendees

Archery Tag at Large Events

For larger venues with more space, Archery Tag is an option too. The full Archery Tag setup requires approximately 50 × 80 feet and is best for ages 10 and up. It is a spectacular crowd-draw and can be run as competitive games or open play depending on your event format.

Combo Setup

Running a multi-activity event or a large festival with space for both? We can run HoverBall and Archery Tag side by side — giving you an archery activity for every age group at your venue.

What We Handle

  • Delivery and full equipment setup at your location
  • On-site staffing for the entire duration of your event
  • Safety instruction for every participant
  • Teardown and removal of all equipment
  • Liability insurance — documentation available upon request

Ideal For

  • City and community festivals
  • Church family days and picnics
  • School carnivals and fundraisers
  • Corporate outdoor events and company picnics
  • Youth organization events and VBS
  • Neighborhood block parties and HOA events

Let's Talk About Your Event

Every festival is different. Contact us to discuss your venue, expected attendance, available space, and event schedule — we will put together a setup that works for you.

Contact Us About Your Event Book Now
